figures.caption: Figure  5: The scaling behaviour of verification time vs the number of draft tokens 𝑇 in the tree. The fused maskedsolve kernel scales substantially better than the perbranch recurrent baseline.

Figure  6: Mean accepted length versus draft length for chain proposals on MTBench (Qwen3.627B, bfloat16, temperature 1.0, reasoning on, budget 16). DFlash argmax+naive overtakes categorical+speculative as draft length grows; DFlashTfM shows no such crossover.
